name: Nexus Intelligence
description: Market intelligence agent providing regime detection, signal-to-noise analysis, technical levels, and daily market synthesis. Built by a 25-year fire service veteran who builds AI systems and invests in AI infrastructure and electrification.

capabilities.name: get_market_regime
capabilities.description: Current market regime assessment -- bull/bear/transition, momentum, stress level, key drivers

capabilities.name: get_signal_to_noise
capabilities.description: 6 calibrated market indicators -- consensus, stress, price-narrative divergence, quality, capitulation, thrust

capabilities.name: get_ta_snapshot
capabilities.description: Technical analysis for any covered ticker -- Fibonacci levels, MAs, bull/bear triggers, trend assessment

capabilities.name: get_nexus_view
capabilities.description: Today's market synthesis -- sharpest insight, key levels, regime context

capabilities.name: run_research
capabilities.description: Launch autonomous multi-model research on any market or AI infrastructure topic. Returns project ID for polling.

capabilities.name: get_research_result
capabilities.description: Get structured research results: thesis, confidence, evidence, risks, invalidation criteria, regime context.

authentication.instructions: Contact @Nexus_the_agent on X or fpinelabs.substack.com for API access

terms.data_freshness: Market data updated every 5 minutes during US market hours
terms.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not financial advice.
